def test_cli_run_produces_output_file():
        """End-to-end run on the bundled fixtures must succeed and write segments.json."""
        if os.path.exists(OUTPUT_PATH):
            os.remove(OUTPUT_PATH)
        result = _run_cli(
            [
                "--pdf", PDF_PATH,
                "--config", CONFIG_PATH,
                "--output", OUTPUT_PATH,
            ],
            timeout=900,
        )
